Quality Education.reason: The course 'Advanced Educational Statistics' directly aims to equip students with methods to 'investigate educational policy and administration problems' and perform 'data analysis for educational problems', strongly aligning with multiple targets of Quality Education (4.1, 4.3, 4.5).
evidence: 具備正確運用高階教育統計學之方法探究教育政策與教育行政問題

Gender Equality.reason: The course provides statistical tools to analyze 'educational policy and administration problems', which can include investigating and addressing gender disparities in education, aligning with Target 5.c on promoting gender equality through sound policies.
evidence: 探究教育政策與教育行政問題

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: While education broadly supports economic growth, the course's specific focus on advanced educational statistics for policy analysis does not directly address targets related to decent work or economic growth policies.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course enhances scientific research capabilities by teaching advanced statistical methods and software (SPSS, SAS, R) to produce 'high-quality thesis' work, directly aligning with Target 9.5 on enhancing scientific research and technological capabilities.
evidence: 能運用SPSS、SAS與R等統計學軟體

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is offered by the Graduate Institute of Educational Administration and Policy and aims to develop the 'ability to evaluate and reform educational administration and school administration practices', directly contributing to building effective and accountable educational institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course, 'Advanced Educational Statistics', focuses on 'data analysis for educational problems' and producing 'high-quality thesis' work, serving as a direct form of statistical capacity-building essential for generating high-quality data for policy and research, aligning with Targets 17.18 and 17.19.
